header.title: We've Got the Answers You're Looking For
header.subtitle: Quick answers to your AI automation questions.

faqItems.question: How can AI automation help my business?
faqItems.answer: AI automation streamlines repetitive tasks, reduces errors, and frees your team to focus on high-value work. Most businesses see 20-40% cost savings in automated areas within the first quarter.

faqItems.question: Is AI automation difficult to integrate?
faqItems.answer: Not at all. We handle the entire integration process and ensure our solutions work seamlessly with your existing tools — Slack, Salesforce, HubSpot, Google Workspace, and many more.

faqItems.question: What industries can benefit from AI automation?
faqItems.answer: Virtually any industry can benefit — from healthcare and finance to retail, logistics, and technology. If your business has repetitive processes, we can automate them.

faqItems.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use AI automation?
faqItems.answer: No. Our solutions are designed to be intuitive and easy to use. We provide full onboarding, team training, and ongoing documentation.

faqItems.question: What kind of support do you offer?
faqItems.answer: All plans include email support. Professional plans add priority support, and Enterprise clients get 24/7 VIP support with a dedicated account manager.

story.title: A team of AI & automation experts
story.content: Hazelgrouse Studio is a team of engineers and consultants specializing in intelligent automation. We combine deep technical expertise with business understanding to deliver solutions that truly transform operations. We believe AI should be accessible to every business — not just enterprises.

faqItems.question: Who is the data controller?
faqItems.answer: The data controller is Hazelgrouse Studio. Data is processed in accordance with applicable laws, including GDPR.

faqItems.question: What data do we collect?
faqItems.answer: We collect data provided by users in contact forms (name, email address) and technical data necessary for the proper functioning of the website.

faqItems.question: For what purposes do we process data?
faqItems.answer: Data is processed for the purpose of handling contact inquiries and providing services.

faqItems.question: What rights does the user have?
faqItems.answer: Users have the right to access, rectify, delete, restrict processing, data portability, and the right to object to processing.
